ticket.subject: Bundled Prodcuts
ticket.description:
Guys

We have recently started to use bundled products and it is making issues with the freight.

For bundled products you have the option to calculate the weight for shipping based on either the sum of all the items (main product and content products) or just using the size and weight of the main item.

In our case we are using the bundled items to allow the system to manage stock , but when we ship - the product weight and volume still just comes from the main product - not the content products as these are built into the main product.



In Woo all the invoices, packing slips etc. ignore the content products - so they do not show, but PluginHive is ignoring the setting Assembled Weight - Ignore and is adding up all the bundled items to get the total size and weight. 


Can you please adjust pluginhive to also ignore the content products when it calculates the weight and volume - as these are built into the items being shipped.

If you need to check an order see 191081 for product Eberspacher D2L AS3 Diesel Air Heater Marine Kit (12V). 

The product has all the items below as content items, but the shipping weight should be 50 x50 x20 and 10kg. But the system is now adding in the weights of all the content itesm as well.


 
Hamish - the lines for the content items must be flagged somehow in Woo so the Assembled weight can be either included or ignored and so the content lines do not show on the checkout screen, invoices etc. - can you please let us now how this works so PluginHive can look for that flag as well.

thanks

Nick


--

Nick Tanner

DIESELHEAT

39 Golden Valley Road
Cygnet TAS 7112
Mobile 0418 130 971

comments.body:
Guys


We have recently started to use bundled products and it is making issues with the freight.



For bundled products you have the option to calculate the weight for shipping based on either the sum of all the items (main product and content products) or just using the size and weight of the main item.



In our case we are using the bundled items to allow the system to manage stock , but when we ship - the product weight and volume still just comes from the main product - not the content products as these are built into the main product.



 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/04nZe0mezjtS2xsCtDrUsbgRj/?name=image.png)



In Woo all the invoices, packing slips etc. ignore the content products - so they do not show, but PluginHive is ignoring the setting Assembled Weight - Ignore and is adding up all the bundled items to get the total size and weight.

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/CoRHVDF2sfMQQKLmYdZPxkm0F/?name=image.png)



Can you please adjust pluginhive to also ignore the content products when it calculates the weight and volume - as these are built into the items being shipped.



If you need to check an order see 191081 for product Eberspacher D2L AS3 Diesel Air Heater Marine Kit (12V).



The product has all the items below as content items, but the shipping weight should be 50 x50 x20 and 10kg. But the system is now adding in the weights of all the content itesm as well.



 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/BK0v1KA8nMnzhGrrSTao7MlAQ/?name=image.png)



Hamish - the lines for the content items must be flagged somehow in Woo so the Assembled weight can be either included or ignored and so the content lines do not show on the checkout screen, invoices etc. - can you please let us now how this works so PluginHive can look for that flag as well.



thanks



Nick





--

Nick Tanner

DIESELHEAT

In our case we are using the bundled items to allow the system to manage stock , but when we ship - the product weight and volume still just comes from the main product - not the content products as these are built into the main product.



In Woo all the invoices, packing slips etc. ignore the content products - so they do not show, but PluginHive is ignoring the setting Assembled Weight - Ignore and is adding up all the bundled items to get the total size and weight. 


Can you please adjust pluginhive to also ignore the content products when it calculates the weight and volume - as these are built into the items being shipped.

If you need to check an order see 191081 for product Eberspacher D2L AS3 Diesel Air Heater Marine Kit (12V). 

The product has all the items below as content items, but the shipping weight should be 50 x50 x20 and 10kg. But the system is now adding in the weights of all the content itesm as well.


 
Hamish - the lines for the content items must be flagged somehow in Woo so the Assembled weight can be either included or ignored and so the content lines do not show on the checkout screen, invoices etc. - can you please let us now how this works so PluginHive can look for that flag as well.

comments.body:
Hello Nick,

Greetings from PluginHive!

As of now, our WooCommerce Shipping Service solution does not support Bundled Products.

We appreciate your understanding.

Feel free to reach out to us if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Nick,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
As of now, our WooCommerce Shipping Service solution does not support Bundled Products.
 
We appreciate your understanding.
 
Feel free to reach out to us if you need any assistance.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

Hi Manohar


Yes _ I know - but we need it to support this as we need to use bundled products but we cannot have the weights being calculated incorrectly on our shipping. Bundled products is an official woo plugin and we need you to support the option to use the main product weight._



_Nick_

We have noted this requirement to check the feasibility in the future. We will notify you if any progress on this subject.


Best Regards,

comments.body:
Hi Sibi


I'm sorry but this needs to be looked at more urgently. It's not complicated and it's not possible that a woo authorised plugin cannot operate with your system. We need bundled products to manage stock and your system for freight. We need your system to work with bundled products.



Please escalate this issue as we need this resolved.



Nick

Please escalate this issue as we need this resolved.

Nick

Please note right now the freight quote in the cart is looking at only the main product, but when booking it includes the weight/volume of the main product + the contents products - so quoting at cart is working differently to booking.



Let me know if you need more information. This is obviously a huge issue for us.



thanks



Nick

Another issue we found - this customer booked Aust. Post express post - but when we made the label your system overrode it to TNT Road Express. I think this is because your system added in the bundle contents at tiem of booking but did not look at them at time of quoting

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/OzKUzSSs821Tac7Fy7RceqU30/?name=image.png)

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/bwqpq057VRxz01zPZkY1lCJfQ/?name=image.png)



but in pluginhive



 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/rbD0KGwXKzIHXylBfWYAvp819/?name=image.png)

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/hBvVKExm5iiOlkC9HXhpeSj6q/?name=image.png)



It is the same issue - but the plugin is actually changing the shipping method as well which we cannot allow.



Nick

why has the carrier changed?

Nick

comments.body:
Hello Nick,

Good Day!

I have checked your query and could observe that in the plugin the Automation Rule for the MyPost Business Account which will control the label generation using MyPost Business services is disabled as shared in the screenshot below.

This is the reason why the plugin in only checking for TNT Australia and DHL rates and assigning the cheapest available service to your Orders.

I have enabled the automation rule from my end and now it should work as expected.

Please cross check the same with a new Order and confirm.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/m8KuTcqAMQQnTmSrEJUjCAOyJ/?name=Untitled2.png)

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Nick,
 
Good Day!
 
I have checked your query and could observe that in the plugin the Automation Rule for the MyPost Business Account which will control the label generation using MyPost Business services is disabled as shared in the screenshot below.
 
This is the reason why the plugin in only checking for TNT Australia and DHL rates and assigning the cheapest available service to your Orders.
 
I have enabled the automation rule from my end and now it should work as expected.
 
Please cross check the same with a new Order and confirm.
 

 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

I am willing to pay a once off fee equal to 1 year of plugin hive  user fee to pluginhive to expedite this.



Thanks



Nick

comments.body:
Hello Nick,

Hope you are doing well.

I am following up on this ticket regarding the enhancement related to the Bundled products.

Due to major developments related to few shipping carriers ad some unforeseen conditions, we were not able to expedite this enhancement.

I would like to know if this enhancement is crucial for your business, so that I can have a discussion with our team and try expediting the enhancement.

Appreciate your patience and understanding with this.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
